templates.name: How can I place an order for a tax-exempt organization?
templates.content: Our wholesale department is ready to assist with your tax-exempt inquiries. Please send an email to sales@warmies.com including your specific request and any relevant documents.

templates.name: What is the difference between My First Warmies and Warmies Juniors?
templates.content:
My First Warmies are made with extra-soft ribbed fabric and feature satin-like details. They weigh approximately 2 lbs and measure 13"x6"x4" in size. Shop My First Warmies here.

Our Warmies Juniors, on the other hand, are slightly smaller, made with plush fur-like outer fabric. They weigh about 0.5 lbs and have dimensions of 9"x5"x2". Shop Warmies Juniors here.

Like all Warmies plushies, both My First Warmies and Warmies Juniors are gently scented with dried French lavender and safe for all ages!

templates.name: Retroactive discount request
templates.content: I'm afraid we're unable to apply codes retroactively. Apologies for the inconvenience.

templates.name: What type of payment do you accept?
templates.content: We're all about sharing the warmth of Warmies so to make shopping convenient, we accept several payment methods, including MasterCard, American Express, Visa, Discover/Novus, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our ambassador program here: https://warmies.com/pages/ambassador

templates.name: How long does the product stay warm?
templates.content: The product should stay warm for 40-45 minutes depending on the range and ambient room temperature.

templates.name: How do I heat up the product?
templates.content: Remove all tags. Make sure that your Warmies are clean and dry. Ensure that the microwave is clean, and that the turntable can rotate freely. Place your Warmies in the microwave and follow the heat times listed on the tags or on our care guide page here: https://warmies.com/pages/care-guide

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: What do the products contain?
templates.content: Each Warmies® product contains a carefully measured amount of flaxseed that have been thoroughly cleaned and dried to a specific moisture content. We also add a hint of dried French Lavender flowers to give a relaxing aroma.

templates.name: What if I overheat the product?
templates.content: All Warmies products carry heating instructions attached to a label sewn into the product and these instructions should be followed very carefully. If your Warmies product has been overheated by mistake you should dispose of it in normal household waste after allowing it to cool to room temperature.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/warmies_usa/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/warmiesusa

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@warmies.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: The product feels damp once heated. Is this normal?
templates.content: Yes, this is quite normal due to the natural moisture content of the filling material and will cease after the first few uses. You can place a piece of paper kitchen towel onto the plate of the microwave and heat as normal for the first few uses if required.

templates.name: I don't have a microwave. Can I heat the product in the oven?
templates.content: We do not recommend heating Warmies in a conventional oven as internal oven temperatures can vary greatly. It is perfectly safe to warm your Warmies product on a radiator when not in use. Warmies have been safety tested for use with microwaves having a maximum power of 1,000 watts.

templates.name: How often can I heat the product?
templates.content: All Warmies products have been designed and manufactured to last for years and can be reheated thousands of times. Always follow the heating guide and allow the product to cool fully between uses.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: What safety tests do the products comply with?
templates.content: All of our products sold in the USA comply with the US toy safety standard ASTM f963-, and meet the CPSIA regulations.

templates.name: How do I clean the product?
templates.content: Surface wash only with a lightly damp cloth. Please do not immerse in water, as this will harm the filling material.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://warmies.com/pages/store-locator

templates.name: Are Intelex Products safe?
templates.content: Intelex is the world's largest manufacturer of microwavable soft toys and gifts and has an impeccable record for safety spanning over 25 years. Warmies are tested safe for all ages. Our products are manufactured to comply with US ASTM f963-17 safety standards and meet the CPSIA regulations.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at sales@warmies.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: What age are the products suitable for?
templates.content: Our heatable products are suitable for all ages but must only be used under careful adult supervision.

templates.name: What is the best way to store your products?
templates.content: We recommend storing Warmies in a cool dry place.

templates.name: How do I use the product as a cool pack?
templates.content: Simply place the entire product within a grip seal freezer bag and place in the freezer for 2-3 hours. This will help to ease bruises and sprains and also reduce temperature.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://warmies.com/pages/returns and you can initiate your return here https://warmies.com/pages/contact-us-form

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2 business days and we usually ship via FedEx, UPS, or UPS SurePost. Once shipped it will take 5-10 business days for domestic orders. We also offer expedited shipping option.

templates.name: Do you ship to APO/FPO?
templates.content: Yes, we offer delivery to APO/FPO addresses at a flat rate of $9.99.

templates.content:
We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://warmies.com/pages/warmies-loyalty-program

We also have a referral program where you can give your friend 20% and get 20% after their first order. Check it out here - https://warmies.com/pages/refer

templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://warmies.com/pages/order-tracking

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I'm afraid we cannot cancel or edit orders once the order has begun to process. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $54. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: All orders are processed and shipped from our home base in Illinois.

templates.name: Do you ship to APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: We offer delivery to APO/FPO addresses at a flat rate of $9.99.

templates.name: Do you ship to Alaska/Hawaii/Canada?
templates.content: At this time, we do not ship to Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico, or Canada.

templates.name: What are your shipping costs?
templates.content:
For standard shipping, orders under $35 are subject to a $6.99 shipping and handling charge and orders over $35 ship for free. 

For express shipping, the prices are calculated at checkout and based on proximity to our home base distribution centre in Illinois, and size of order.

templates.name: Do you offer expedited shipping?
templates.content: We offer UPS 2-Day Air Freight. Prices are calculated at checkout and based on proximity to our home base distribution center in Illinois, and the size of the order. Please note that express orders received on Friday will ship out the following Monday.

templates.name: Can you personalize Warmies?
templates.content:
Wamies make excellent gifts for loved ones of all ages. Currently, we do not offer personalization or customization options for Warmies. However, with so many styles and colors available, we're confident you can find something your friend or family member will love!

We release dozens of new products every year. Be sure to subscribe to our promotional emails so you can be among the first to know about all the new Warmies.

templates.name: Can Warmies go through airport security?
templates.content: You'll be happy to know Warmies are frequent flyers! Warmies make excellent travel buddies and do not contain any materials or substances that violate airport security rules. Our products are filled with flaxseed, dried French lavender, and finished with an ultra-soft polyblend outer fabric. They should have no trouble earning TSA's stamp of approval before takeoff!

templates.name: Do they come unscented?   ​
templates.content:
Our carefully sourced French lavender is a significant part of what makes Warmies so calming and comforting. However, we understand that it may not be everyone's preference, and we always appreciate hearing our customers' feedback to better inform our product team.

At this time, we do not offer any unscented styles, but we are actively developing some exciting new products. Make sure to subscribe to our promotional emails so you can be among the first to hear about our new releases!

templates.name: How do I use Warmies?
templates.content:
Warmies plushies and wellness products were designed to offer soothing comfort for individuals of all ages, including adults and children. Our products are infused with dried French lavender to promote relaxation, and they feature a warmable, weighted filling to help reduce anxiety during playtime and bedtime.

When you're ready to relax, simply follow the instructions in our care guide to heat your Warmies in the microwave or place them in a grip-seal freezer bag and chill them for up to 3 hours to enjoy a refreshing coolness. You can cuddle up on the couch, take Warmies to bed, or carry them for comfort on the go.

Whether heated or chilled, Warmies can alleviate aches and pains, help you unwind after a long day, and make bedtime more comfortable for the whole family.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Our products are manufactured overseas in China, and distributed in East Dundee, Illinois, where we proudly provide employment to over 150 skilled workers in the United States. We sincerely appreciate your support of Warmies.

templates.name: Are your items weighted?
templates.content:
Yes! Our items are thoughtfully weighted to alleviate anxiety and provide comfort. Our full-size plushies weigh about 2 lbs, while Warmies Juniors weigh about .5 lb.

Additionally, our wellness products are also lightly weighted, offering a therapeutic and sensory experience to aid in relaxation.

templates.name: Do Warmies come with gift wrapping?
templates.content: Warmies make great gifts, but to keep our processes streamlined (and to get your orders shipped as quickly as possible) we do not offer gift wrapping at this time. However, feel free to include a personalized message on your order during the checkout process, and we'll print it on the packing slip!

templates.name: Are Warmies safe for people with diabetes?
templates.content:
Our products are designed for everyone, and many customers with diabetes have found comfort with Warmies.

However, it's important to note that some people with diabetic peripheral neuropathy cannot tell when something is too hot or too cold for their skin. Excessively heating Warmies and placing them on your skin may cause burns. For this reason, we recommend you always follow the heating and cooling instructions located on the hangtags, packaging, and sewn-in labels (You can also find instructions in our care guide).

Additionally, if you or your child have diabetes, we recommend consulting your doctor before using Warmies.

templates.name: What are Warmies? ​
templates.content: We're so glad you asked! Warmies are soothing, loveable plushies and wellness products that can be heated in the microwave or chilled in the freezer for therapeutic comfort. All Warmies are gently scented with dried French lavender sourced from Provence, France. They are weighted with flaxseed for a sensory experience. Designed to maximize relaxation and promote calm, they're great for naptime, bedtime, or any time you or your little one needs some tranquility.

templates.name: Do you offer a financing option?
templates.content: We are proud to offer Afterpay! This allows you to pay for your Warmies purchase in four easy and interest-free installments - no additional fees required. Learn more about Afterpay here https://www.afterpay.com/en-US/how-it-works

templates.name: Are Warmies safe for pets?
templates.content:
As fellow pet lovers, we appreciate this question! After all, our furry friends need cozy comfort too.

Warmies plushies and wellness products have been tested in accordance with U.S. safety standards and are safe for people of all ages. However, we have not tested their safety for animals.

We recommend reaching out to your veterinarian before allowing your pet to cozy up with Warmies.
